nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 11am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 65 in the afternoon. Southeast wind 13 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
